summary: The 15th edition of the ECMAScript language standard. Defines the SameValue and SameValueZero abstract equality operations, under which NaN equals NaN and SameValue distinguishes +0 from -0 (the semantics exposed as Object.is and followed by structural deep-equality at the leaves). Also introduces Object.groupBy and Map.groupBy via the GroupBy abstract operation: elements are partitioned by a callback-produced key, groups are created in first-encounter order, and elements within a group keep source iteration order, materialised on a null-prototype object so keys like "__proto__" become ordinary buckets.
title: ECMAScript® 2024 Language Specification
